author: brandiskip
body:
This PR adds track-level rate monitoring (fake rate, duplicate rate, and per-event track rate) to the Phase2 Outer Tracker L1 track validation, for both the **nominal (prompt)** and **extended (prompt + displaced)** L1 track collections. All quantities are MC-truth based (`TTTrackAssociationMap` / `isGenuine`) and follow the definitions in [L1TrackNtuplePlot.C](https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/blob/master/L1Trigger/TrackFindingTracklet/test/L1TrackNtuplePlot.C).

### Analyzer: [Phase2OTValidateTracks.cc](https://github.com/brandiskip/cmssw/blob/l1tk-phase2-track-rate-fake-dup-monitoring/Validation/SiTrackerPhase2V/plugins/Phase2OTValidateTracks.cc)
- New `processTrackRates()` loops over the reconstructed L1 tracks and fills, per collection: `trk_all_vspt` (denominator), `trk_fake_vspt` (tracks failing `isGenuine`), and the per-event multiplicities `ntrk_pt2` / `ntrk_pt3` / `ntrk_pt10`.
- Duplicate counting added in `processTrackCollection()`: for each tracking particle, every genuine L1 track matched to it beyond the first fills `trk_duplicate_vspt`.
- New ingredient histograms booked under `Nominal_L1TF/TrackRateIngredients` and `Extended_L1TF/TrackRateIngredients`; `TH1Track_pt` and `TH1NTracks` PSets added to `fillDescriptions`.

### Harvester: [Phase2OTHarvestTracks.cc](https://github.com/brandiskip/cmssw/blob/l1tk-phase2-track-rate-fake-dup-monitoring/Validation/SiTrackerPhase2V/plugins/Phase2OTHarvestTracks.cc)
Forms the final rate plots under `Nominal_L1TF/FinalRates` and `Extended_L1TF/FinalRates`:
- `fakeFraction_vspt` = `trk_fake_vspt / trk_all_vspt` 
- `duplicateFraction_vspt` = `trk_duplicate_vspt / trk_all_vspt` 
- `trackRate_vspt` = `trk_all_vspt / nEvents` 

### Helpers: [TrackerPhase2HistUtil.h](https://github.com/brandiskip/cmssw/blob/l1tk-phase2-track-rate-fake-dup-monitoring/Validation/SiTrackerPhase2V/interface/TrackerPhase2HistUtil.h)
- Added `bookFraction()` (num/den via `TH1::Divide(..., "B")`) and `bookPerEventRate()` (counts / `nEvents` with `Sumw2`), removing duplicated harvesting code.

### DQM output
Users will see the new histograms under `TrackerPhase2OTL1TrackV`  `{Nominal_L1TF, Extended_L1TF}`  `{TrackRateIngredients, FinalRates}`.

Full set of histograms can be reviewed [here](https://cernbox.cern.ch/files/spaces/eos/user/b/bskipwor/public/ValidationPlots?items-per-page=100&files-spaces-generic-view-mode=resource-table&tiles-size=2) under `TrackerPhase2OTL1TrackV`.

### PR validation
```
scram build code-checks
scram build code-format
```
title: Phase2OT L1 track validation: add fake/duplicate/track-rate plots
